states.name: submitted
states.description: Restore intent is durable and awaits compatibility/authorization validation.
entry_requirements: Bundle, target intent, scope and policies are recorded.

states.name: validating
states.description: Checkpoint verification, target compatibility, authority and grants are being evaluated.

states.name: accepted
states.description: Request is accepted into a Restore Run.
entry_requirements: Non-expired compatibility decision, Restore Activity and decision Receipt exist.

states.name: rejected
states.description: Restore will not proceed under current target/scope/policy.
entry_requirements: Typed rejection and evidence exist before mutation.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Request was cancelled before accepted restore completed.
entry_requirements: Cancellation and temporary state are reconciled.

required_preconditions: Request is schema-valid and authority is identified.
Bundle verification, target state, compatibility and grants can be evaluated without mutation.
Compatibility decision is non-expired and requested full/partial scope is explicitly approved.
Incompatibility, missing grant, privacy, policy or scope reason is retained before mutation.
Cancellation and validation temporary state are reconciled.
